steps.title: Use the fellowship's purpose
steps.content: The fellowship is awarded to exceptional folk and traditional artists. Lin Xiaomei was chosen for lifetime contributions to the arts, so the verb must mean recognizing or celebrating achievement.

steps.title: Reject the wrong actions
steps.content: A would mean the fellowship starts exceptional artists. C means to make someone seem less important, and D means to divert attention. None fits an award for achievement. The answer is B.
